creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-06-26 07:17:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/umurmur        Makefile distinfo pkg-deinstall pkg-descr 
                         pkg-install pkg-plist 
    audio/umurmur/files  patch-Makefile patch-conf.c umurmur.in 
  Log:
  uMurmur is a minimalistic Mumble server primarily targeted to run on
  routers with an open OS like OpenWRT.
  The server part of Mumble is called Murmur, hence the name uMurmur.
  
  WWW:    http://http://code.google.com/p/umurmur/
  
  PR:             ports/154995
  Submitted by:   Ayumi Mitsui <ayu at commun.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1172    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/audio/umurmur/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/files/patch-conf.c (new)
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/files/umurmur.in (new)
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/pkg-deinstall (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/audio/umurmur/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/audio/umurmur/pkg-install (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/audio/umurmur/pkg-plist (new)
